title: STAC OSI Extension
description: Links STAC Collections and Items to an OSI (Open Semantic Interchange / Apache Ossie) semantic model and annotates the semantic role of tabular columns.

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Collections.
This is the schema for STAC Items.

osi:version.description: Version of the OSI specification the linked semantic model and column annotations conform to.

osi:semantic_model_href.description: Optional pointer to the OSI semantic model document when it is not attached as an asset.

osi:metrics.description: Denormalized summary of the metrics defined in the linked semantic model, surfaced for discovery and search.

name.description: Metric identifier as defined in the OSI semantic model.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the metric measures.

table:columns.description: Column definitions from the STAC Table extension, optionally annotated with OSI semantic roles.

osi:role.description: Semantic role of the column in the OSI model. A dimension groups or filters, a measure is aggregated, time is a temporal dimension, spatial is a geometry or spatial index column.

osi:semantic_type.description: Optional richer semantic type for the column, for example currency, identifier, or email.

osi:spatial.description: Spatial descriptor for a column with osi:role spatial. Prototype of the OSI spatial dimension descriptor (OSI Discussion 114).

geometry_type.description: Geometry kind, following OGC and ISO usage where geometry is planar and geography is spherical.

srid.description: EPSG spatial reference identifier, for example 4326.

spatial_index.description: Discrete global grid index carried by the column, when applicable.
